calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for (petitioner) Antonio Villasenor. Nancy Lofdahl for (beneficiary/petitioner) Rolando Beltran.

The Court stated that various waivers and consents have been filed, that Rolando Beltran has filed a joinder in the petition and it does not see any problems. The Court granted the petition for order approving modification of trust terms (subject to review of the order). The petition for instructions is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Continued To Aug-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for (petitioner/trustee) Antonio Villasenor. Nancy Lofdahl for (beneficiary) Rolando Beltran. Michaela Villasenor (beneficiary) also present.

The Court stated that this is a petition for modification and that the issue is whether petitioner could become trustee by nomination. Ms. Robello stated that per the terms of the trust there are several ways to fill the trustee position including appointment by the resigning trustee. The Court stated that that applies to the parent trust not the subtrust. Ms. Robello stated that the subtrust follows the large trust and explained why. The Court stated that there is nothing that says they are the same pointing to sections 4.5 and 4.2 of the trust and that section 6 creates a separate trust which appoints its own trustee. Ms. Robello responded with there are no provisions for replacement, that when the provisions are in the big trust the subtrust operates under the same provisions. Ms. Lofdahl gave her interpretation of the trust. The Court stated that there is a jurisdictional question, that no one wants a court order that will be vacated later and that a beneficiary could join as a petitioner or file a petition seeking confirmation/approval. Ms. Lofdahl stated that she would stipulate to Michaela Villasenor as she is present in court. Ms. Robello asked that if they received consent to a joinder from everyone would the court waive the notice requirements. The Court stated that it would need consents from everyone entitled to notice, that it would need to be a petitioner with standing and asked why it needed to be done quickly. Ms. Robello explained the settlement for sale of property, that it required negotiations with the tenants and that there are time limits. The petition for instructions and the petition for order approving modification of the trust terms were continued to August 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. All waivers and the amended petition must be filed by close of business on 8/20/15.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Settle Ambiguities In The Application Of Provisions In The Second Restatement Of Trust Dated December 7, 2010 And F
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gino Molinari for and with Antonio Villasenor. Nancy Lofdahl for Rolando Beltran (Respondent/Objector).

Ms. Lofdahl stated that mediation was held with Daniel Conrad, that it appeared that the parties had different goals, that Mr. Conrad is willing to do a supplemental mediation, and that she doesn't think an additional mediation will be successful since the parties have different goals. Mr. Molinari concurred. Ms. Lofdahl stated that she would be filing a petition to remove Mr. Villasenor and a partition action. The Court stated that the matter would be set for trial. The parties stated that the trial would be more than one day. The Court referred the matter to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) and set the trial date as follows: April 6, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 206 (order for the same signed in open court) noting that Ms. Lofdahl will be filing additional petitions before the trial date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Settle Ambiguities In The Application Of Provisions In The Second Restatement Of Trust Dated December 7, 2010 And F
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Continued To Nov-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gino Molinari for (petitioner) Antonio Villasenor and also specially appearing for Nancy Lofdahl.

Mr. Molinari reported that the mediator had a conflict and that the mediation has been continued to October 29, 2014. The Petition for declaratory relief to settle ambiguities was continued to November 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy McConoco. (Not Reported)

Petition For Declaratory Relief To Settle Ambiguities In The Application Of Provisions In The Second Restatement Of Trust Dated December 7, 2010 And F
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Sep-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gino Molinari for Antonio Villasenor (Petitioner) and making a special appearance for opposing Counsel Nancy Lofdahl for Rolando Beltran.

Mr. Molinari stated that the Parties are requesting to be sent to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 22, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 22, 2014. The Petition for Declaratory Relief to Settle Ambiguities, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on September 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
